sqlMap.sql:
a.WRITER_ID = #userId#
a.WRITER_DEPT_ID = #searchDeptId#
#deptIdList[]#
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.APPR_USER_NAME2 ELSE a.APPR_USER_NAME END LIKE '%' || #apprUserName# ||'%'
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.WRITER_NAME2 ELSE a.WRITER_NAME END LIKE '%' || #writerName# || '%'
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME2 ELSE a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME END LIKE '%' || #writerDeptName# || '%'
a.CHANGE_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate# || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
a.CHANGE_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(#endDate# || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
a.APPR_STATUS = #type#
AND a.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY
START_DATE WRITER_NAME WRITER_DEPT_NAME APPR_STATUS APPR_USER_NAME APPL_DATE DESC,
a.APPL_DATE DESC,
a.APPL_CNT DESC

a.WRITER_ID = #userId#
a.WRITER_DEPT_ID = #searchDeptId#
#deptIdList[]#
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.APPR_USER_NAME2 ELSE a.APPR_USER_NAME END LIKE '%' || #apprUserName# || '%'
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.WRITER_NAME2 ELSE a.WRITER_NAME END LIKE '%' || #writerName# || '%'
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME2 ELSE a.WRITER_DEPT_NAME END LIKE '%' || #writerDeptName# || '%'
b.START_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
b.START_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
a.APPR_STATUS = #type#
AND a.DELFLAG = 0 ORDER BY
START_DATE WRITER_NAME WRITER_DEPT_NAME TYPE_NAME APPR_STATUS APPR_USER_NAME APPL_DATE DESC,
a.APPL_DATE DESC,
a.APPL_CNT DESC
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.WRITER_ID, A.DEPT_ID, CASE WHEN A.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN substr(#startDate#, 1, 11) || substr(to_char(A.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) ELSE TO_CHAR(A.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS START_DATE, CASE WHEN A.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN substr(#endDate#, 1, 11) || substr(to_char(A.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) ELSE TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS END_DATE, A.MODAPPL, A.REGION, A.MOBILE, A.BIZSUB, A.CONTENT, A.IP, A.DATE_TYPE, A.TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TYPE_NAME2 ELSE B.TYPE_NAME END AS TYPE_NAME, B.IMG_PATH, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS WRITER_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE C.DESCRIPTION END AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME, A.ATTEND_TYPE, A.LATITUDE, A.LONGITUDE, A.WORK_STATUS FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON (A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND ISDEL = 0) INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster C ON (C.CN = A.WRITER_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = C.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) WHERE
(
#pidListArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
)
A.TYPE_ID = #typeId#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND c.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
AND A.MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( (START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) )
UNION SELECT D.ATTITUDE_ID, D.COMPANY_ID, D.TENANT_ID, D.WRITER_ID, D.DEPT_ID, CASE WHEN D.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN substr(#startDate#, 1, 11) || substr(TO_CHAR(D.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) ELSE TO_CHAR(D.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS START_DATE, CASE WHEN D.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN substr(#endDate#, 1, 11) || substr(TO_CHAR(D.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) ELSE TO_CHAR(D.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS END_DATE, D.MODAPPL, D.REGION, D.MOBILE, D.BIZSUB, D.CONTENT, D.IP, D.DATE_TYPE, D.TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN E.TYPE_NAME2 ELSE E.TYPE_NAME END AS TYPE_NAME, E.IMG_PATH, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN F.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE F.DISPLAYNAME END AS WRITER_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN F.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE F.DESCRIPTION END AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME, D.ATTEND_TYPE, D.LATITUDE, D.LONGITUDE, D.WORK_STATUS FROM tbl_attitude D INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type E ON (D.TYPE_ID = E.TYPE_ID AND D.COMPANY_ID = E.COMPANY_ID AND D.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster F ON (F.CN = D.WRITER_ID AND D.COMPANY_ID = F.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND D.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER G ON (
#deptIdArr[]#
AND D.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND D.WRITER_ID = G.CN ) WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
D.TYPE_ID = #typeId#
AND D.MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( (START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) )
) H ORDER BY H.START_DATE, H.TYPE_ID
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( MOD_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_STARTDATE, CHANGE_ENDDATE, CHANGE_REGION, CHANGE_MOBILE, CHANGE_BIZSUB, CHANGE_CONTENT, CHANGE_IP, CHANGE_DATE_TYPE, CHANGE_TYPE_ID, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE ) SELECT SEQ_TBL_ATTI_MODAPPL_HISTORY.nextval, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, b.displayname, b.displayname2, b.title, b.title2, #deptId#, b.DESCRIPTION, b.DESCRIPTION2, TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), DECODE(#endDate#, '', null, TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60)), NVL(#region#, ''), NVL(#mobile#, ''), NVL(#bizSub#, ''), NVL(#content#, ''), NVL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#, a.type_name, a.type_name2, #adminId#, c.displayname, c.displayname2, TO_DATE(#apprDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM (select * from tbl_attitude_type where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) a , (select * from tbl_usermaster where cn = #writerId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) b , (select * from tbl_usermaster where cn = #adminId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

select.isEqual: SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_user_conf WHERE USER_ID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT WORK_STARTTIME, WORK_ENDTIME FROM tbl_attitude_conf WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(START_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS START_DATE, WRITER_ID FROM tbl_attitude where COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ATTITUDE_ID = #ids#

SELECT a.attitude_id AS ATTITUDE_ID, TO_CHAR(a.change_date + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHANGE_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.appr_user_name2 ELSE a.appr_user_name END AS APPR_USER_NAME, TO_CHAR(a.origin_date + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS START_DATE, a.appr_status AS APPR_STATUS, c.type_id AS TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN c.type_name2 ELSE c.type_name END AS TYPE_NAME, a.content AS CONTENT, a.writer_id AS WRITER_ID, a.writer_dept_id AS WRITER_DEPT_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_name2 ELSE a.writer_name END AS WRITER_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_title2 ELSE a.writer_title END AS WRITER_TITLE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_dept_name2 ELSE a.writer_dept_name END AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME FROM tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID inner join tbl_attitude_type c on b.TYPE_ID = c.TYPE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = c.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = c.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
and a.APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
and rownum > 0 and rownum <= 1 order by a.APPL_CNT DESC

SELECT SUM( TRUNC( TO_DATE( CASE WHEN END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN #endDate# ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(END_DATE, START_DATE) + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - TO_DATE( CASE WHEN START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN #startDate# ELSE TO_CHAR(START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 0)) + COUNT(TYPE_ID) AS COUNT, TYPE_ID FROM tbl_attitude WHERE (
#pidListArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
#deptIdArr[]#
) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND WRITER_ID NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A03', 'A25') AND MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( (START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) ) GROUP BY TYPE_ID

SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = b.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_attitude_modappl a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#

SELECT HOLIDAYID, HOLIDAYNAME, HOLIDAYNAME2, HOLIDAYDATE, ISSOLAR, ISREPEAT, ISREST, ISUSE, USECOMPANY, HOLIDAYFLAG, HOLIDAYREPEAT FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE (USECOMPANY = 'ALL' or USECOMPANY = #companyId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND isuse = 1
AND isrest = 1
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM ( SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#)t)
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A SET A.MODAPPL = #modappl# WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MODAPPL FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A SET A.MODAPPL = #modappl# WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#

UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A INNER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = B.ATTITUDE_ID SET A.MODAPPL = #modappl#
,A.START_DATE = B.CHANGE_DATE ,A.TYPE_ID = "A02"
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
#ids[]#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.FORM_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TO_CHAR(A.FORM_HTML2) ELSE TO_CHAR(A.FORM_HTML) END AS FORM_HTML FROM tbl_attitude_form A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON A.FORM_ID = B.FORM_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND B.TYPE_ID = #typeId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL( ATTITUDE_ID, APPL_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, ORIGIN_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT, APPL_DATE ) VALUES( #attitudeId#, ( SELECT NVL(MAX(a.APPL_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL a WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# ), #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerTitle#, #writerTitle2#, #writerDeptId#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, TO_DATE(#changeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60), TO_DATE(#originDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offset# / (24 * 60), #delFlag#, #apprStatus#, #content#, TO_DATE(#applDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') )

INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL( ATTITUDE_ID, APPL_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE, CHANGE_DATE, ORIGIN_DATE, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT, APPL_DATE ) SELECT #attitudeId#, ( SELECT NVL(MAX(a.APPL_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL a WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# ), #companyId#, #tenantId#, #adminId#, b.DISPLAYNAME, b.DISPLAYNAME2, b.TITLE, b.TITLE2, b.DEPARTMENT, b.DESCRIPTION, b.DESCRIPTION2, #adminId#, b.DISPLAYNAME, b.DISPLAYNAME2, TO_DATE(#apprDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#changeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), TO_DATE(#originDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), '1', #content#, TO_DATE(#applDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM (select * from tbl_usermaster where cn = #adminId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# ) b
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL SET CONTENT = #content#, CHANGE_DATE = to_date((to_date(#changeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), APPL_DATE = #applDate# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND WRITER_ID = #userId# AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.WRITER_ID, A.DEPT_ID, TO_CHAR(A.START_DATE + (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE + (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS END_DATE, A.MODAPPL, A.REGION, A.MOBILE, A.BIZSUB, A.CONTENT, A.IP, A.DATE_TYPE, A.TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TYPE_NAME2 ELSE B.TYPE_NAME END AS TYPE_NAME, B.IMG_PATH, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS DISPLAYNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE C.DESCRIPTION END AS DESCRIPTION, NVL(D.ANNUAL_APPR_STATUS, -1) as ANNUAL_APPR_STATUS, NVL( ( SELECT FUNCTIONTYPE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO E WHERE D.ANNUAL_DOC_ID = E.DOCID OR D.ANNUAL_DOC_ID = E.ORGDOCID ) , 0) AS DOC_APPR_STATUS FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.WRITER_ID = C.CN LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_APR_CONN D ON (A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = D.COMPANY_ID AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = D.ATTITUDE_ID) WHERE A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL SET APPR_STATUS =
1
2
,APPR_DATE = TO_DATE(#apprDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,APPR_USER_ID = #userId# ,APPR_USER_NAME = #displayName# ,APPR_USER_NAME2 = #displayName2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
AND APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)

UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL SET APPR_STATUS =
1
2
,APPR_DATE = TO_DATE(#apprDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,APPR_USER_ID = #adminId# ,APPR_USER_NAME = (SELECT displayname from tbl_usermaster where cn=#adminId# and tenant_id=#tenantId#) ,APPR_USER_NAME2 = (SELECT displayname2 from tbl_usermaster where cn=#adminId# and tenant_id=#tenantId#) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
AND APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)

UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE SET START_DATE = (SELECT CHANGE_DATE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#))
) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE A SET A.TYPE_ID = #typeId# WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( ATTITUDE_ID, MOD_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT ) SELECT ATTITUDE_ID, (SELECT NVL(MAX(MOD_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM tbl_attitude_modappl_history WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND
#ids[]# ), COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_DATE, DELFLAG, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, APPR_DATE,
1
2 , CONTENT FROM tbl_attitude_modappl WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND
#ids[]#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_attitude WHERE ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
UPDATE tbl_attitude SET TYPE_ID = #typeId#, REGION = #region#, MOBILE = #mobile#, BIZSUB = #bizSub#, CONTENT = #content#, DATE_TYPE = #dateType#, IP = #ipAddress#, START_DATE = to_date(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60)), END_DATE = (CASE WHEN #endDate# = '' THEN null ELSE (to_date(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (#offsetMin# / (24 * 60))) END)
,MODAPPL = #modappl#
,LATITUDE = #latitude# ,LONGITUDE = #longitude#
WHERE ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, to_char(A.APPR_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS APPR_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.APPR_USER_NAME2 ELSE A.APPR_USER_NAME END AS APPR_USER_NAME, A.APPR_STATUS, A.CONTENT, to_char(A.ORIGIN_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ORIGIN_DATE, to_char(A.CHANGE_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHANGE_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TITLE2 ELSE B.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE B.DESCRIPTION END AS DESCRIPTION FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.APPR_USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# ORDER BY A.APPR_DATE DESC, A.APPL_CNT DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( MOD_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, CHANGE_STARTDATE, CHANGE_ENDDATE, CHANGE_REGION, CHANGE_MOBILE, CHANGE_BIZSUB, CHANGE_CONTENT, CHANGE_IP, CHANGE_DATE_TYPE, CHANGE_TYPE_ID, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME, CHANGE_TYPE_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, ATTITUDE_ID, ORIGIN_STARTDATE, ORIGIN_ENDDATE, ORIGIN_CONTENT, ORIGIN_REGION, ORIGIN_MOBILE, ORIGIN_BIZSUB, ORIGIN_IP, ORIGIN_TYPE_ID, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME2, ORIGIN_DATE_TYPE, APPR_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_ATTI_MODAPPL_HISTORY.nextval, #attVO.companyId#, #tenantId#, #attVO.writerId#, #userInfo.userName#, #userInfo.userName2#, #userInfo.title#, #userInfo.title2#, #attVO.deptId#, #userInfo.deptName#, #userInfo.deptName2#, (CASE WHEN #startDate# = '' THEN null ELSE to_date(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) END), (CASE WHEN #endDate# = '' THEN null ELSE to_date(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) END), NVL(#region#, ''), NVL(#mobile#, ''), NVL(#bizSub#, ''), NVL(#content#, ''), NVL(#ipAddress#, ''), #dateType#, #typeId#, (select type_name from tbl_attitude_type where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #attVO.companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#), (select type_name2 from tbl_attitude_type where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #attVO.companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#), #adminId#, #adminInfo.userName#, #adminInfo.userName2#, #attitudeId#, TO_DATE(#attVO.startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), (CASE WHEN #attVO.endDate# = '' THEN null ELSE TO_DATE(#attVO.endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) END), #attVO.content#, #attVO.region#, #attVO.mobile#, #attVO.bizSub#, #attVO.ip#, #attVO.typeId#, #attVO.typeName#, #attVO.typeName2#, #attVO.dateType#, TO_DATE(#apprDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') )

INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_modappl_history( MOD_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, APPR_USER_ID, APPR_USER_NAME, APPR_USER_NAME2, ATTITUDE_ID, ORIGIN_STARTDATE, ORIGIN_ENDDATE, ORIGIN_CONTENT, ORIGIN_REGION, ORIGIN_MOBILE, ORIGIN_BIZSUB, ORIGIN_IP, ORIGIN_TYPE_ID, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME, ORIGIN_TYPE_NAME2, ORIGIN_DATE_TYPE, APPR_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_TBL_ATTI_MODAPPL_HISTORY.nextval, #attVO.companyId#, #tenantId#, #attVO.writerId#, #userInfo.userName#, #userInfo.userName2#, #userInfo.title#, #userInfo.title2#, #attVO.deptId#, #userInfo.deptName#, #userInfo.deptName2#, #adminId#, #adminInfo.userName#, #adminInfo.userName2#, #attitudeId#, TO_DATE(#attVO.startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), (CASE WHEN #attVO.endDate# = '' THEN null ELSE TO_DATE(#attVO.endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) END), #attVO.content#, #attVO.region#, #attVO.mobile#, #attVO.bizSub#, #attVO.ip#, #attVO.typeId#, #attVO.typeName#, #attVO.typeName2#, #attVO.dateType#, TO_DATE(#apprDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') )

select.isEqual: select attitude_id from tbl_attitude where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and writer_id = #writerId# and type_id = #typeId# and start_date >= TO_DATE((#checkStartDate# || ' 00:00:00'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) and start_date <= TO_DATE((#checkStartDate# || ' 23:59:59'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60)
select.isNotEqual:
select count(*) from tbl_attitude where tenant_id = #tenantId# and company_id = #companyId# and writer_id = #writerId#
#typeIdArr[]#
and start_date >= TO_DATE((#checkStartDate# || ' 00:00:00'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) and start_date <= TO_DATE((#checkStartDate# || ' 23:59:59'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - #offsetMin# / (24 * 60)

sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTALCOUNT FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A
WHERE
(DISPLAYNAME LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
(DESCRIPTION LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR DESCRIPTION2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
(A.TITLE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR A.TITLE2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
TELEPHONENUMBER LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
MOBILE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
HOMEPHONE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
MAIL LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
STREETADDRESS LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
#deptIdList[]#
AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.cn = B.cn and A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id
WHERE
(DISPLAYNAME LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
(DESCRIPTION LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR DESCRIPTION2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
(A.TITLE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR A.TITLE2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
TELEPHONENUMBER LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
MOBILE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
HOMEPHONE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
MAIL LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
STREETADDRESS LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
#deptIdList[]#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# ) A

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by CN) as RNUM, cn, displayName, type, DESCRIPTION, JOBID, ROLEID FROM (SELECT cn, department as displayName, 'USER' as type, DESCRIPTION, '' AS JOBID, '' AS ROLEID FROM TBL_USERMASTER A
WHERE
(DISPLAYNAME LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
(DESCRIPTION LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR DESCRIPTION2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
(A.TITLE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR A.TITLE2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
TELEPHONENUMBER LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
MOBILE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
HOMEPHONE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
MAIL LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
STREETADDRESS LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
#deptIdList[]#
AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.cn, deptid as displayName, 'ADDJOB' as type, DESCRIPTION, A.JOBID AS JOBID, A.ROLEID AS ROLEID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.cn = B.cn AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id
WHERE
(DISPLAYNAME LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
(DESCRIPTION LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR DESCRIPTION2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
(A.TITLE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%') OR A.TITLE2 LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%'))
TELEPHONENUMBER LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
MOBILE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
HOMEPHONE LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
MAIL LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
STREETADDRESS LIKE ('%' || #v_SEARCHPARAM# || '%')
#deptIdList[]#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#) AA ) BB WHERE RNUM >= #startRow# AND RNUM < #endRow# ORDER BY DESCRIPTION

SELECT appr_status as APPR_STATUS FROM tbl_attitude_modappl where COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
and APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
and rownum > 0 and rownum <= 1 order by APPL_CNT DESC

SELECT NVL((SUM( TRUNC( TO_DATE( CASE WHEN END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN #endDate# ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(END_DATE, START_DATE) + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - TO_DATE( CASE WHEN START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN #startDate# ELSE TO_CHAR(START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 0)) + SUM( CASE WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A11' THEN 1 WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A12' THEN 0.5 WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A13' THEN 0.5 ELSE 0 END ) ), 0) AS ANNUAL_COUNT, SUBSTR(#startDate#, 6, 2) AS MONTH FROM tbl_attitude WHERE WRITER_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID IN ('A11', 'A12', 'A13') AND MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( (START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL( ATTITUDE_ID, APPL_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITER_ID, WRITER_NAME, WRITER_NAME2, WRITER_TITLE, WRITER_TITLE2, WRITER_DEPT_ID, WRITER_DEPT_NAME, WRITER_DEPT_NAME2, APPR_STATUS, CONTENT, APPL_DATE ) VALUES( #attitudeId#, ( SELECT NVL(MAX(a.APPL_CNT) + 1, 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL a WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# ), #companyId#, #tenantId#, #writerId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerTitle#, #writerTitle2#, #writerDeptId#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, #apprStatus#, #content#, TO_DATE(#applDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT USER_ID, TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE),JOIN_DATE)) AS WORKINGMONTHCNT, TO_CHAR(JOIN_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS JOIN_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL WHERE 1 = 1
AND TO_CHAR(JOIN_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') LIKE '%-%-' || #yesterday# || '%'
AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND JOIN_DATE IS NOT NULL AND JOIN_DATE <= SYSDATE

SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(TRUNC(END_DATE-START_DATE) + 2, 1)), 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE (TYPE_ID != 'A02' AND TYPE_ID != 'A17') AND WRITER_ID = #userId# AND START_DATE >= #joinDate#
AND START_DATE <= TO_DATE(#oneDayAgo#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (540/(60*24)) AND START_DATE > TO_DATE(#oneMonthAgo#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - (540/(60*24))
AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL SET
ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT = #holidayCnt#
MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT = MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT + #holidayCnt#
- MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT
ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT = #holidayCnt#, MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT = #holidayCnt#
WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF B ON A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID

SELECT NVL(SUM(NVL(MONTHS_BETWEEN(START_DATE,END_DATE) + 1, 1)), 0) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE TYPE_ID = 'A17' AND WRITER_ID = #userid# AND START_DATE >= TO_DATE(#oneMonthAgo#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - 540 / (24 * 60) AND START_DATE < TO_DATE(#oneDayAgo#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - 540 / (24 * 60) AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT TYPE_ID AS typeId, NVL(SUM(NVL(MONTHS_BETWEEN(START_DATE,END_DATE) + 1, 1)), 0) AS cnt FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE TYPE_ID IN ('A11','A12','A13','A21') AND WRITER_ID = #userId# AND START_DATE >= #joinDate# AND START_DATE < #today# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND MODAPPL NOT IN ('1','5') GROUP BY TYPE_ID
SELECT MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT appr_status as APPR_STATUS FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
and APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
and ROWNUM = 1 order by APPL_CNT DESC
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM ( SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#)t)
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = b.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)

SELECT a.attitude_id AS ATTITUDE_ID, to_char(b.end_date + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHANGE_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.appr_user_name2 ELSE a.appr_user_name END AS APPR_USER_NAME, to_char(b.start_date + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS START_DATE, a.appr_status AS APPR_STATUS, c.type_id AS TYPE_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN c.type_name2 ELSE c.type_name END AS TYPE_NAME, a.content AS CONTENT, a.writer_id AS WRITER_ID, a.writer_dept_id AS WRITER_DEPT_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_name2 ELSE a.writer_name END AS WRITER_NAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_title2 ELSE a.writer_title END AS WRITER_TITLE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN a.writer_dept_name2 ELSE a.writer_dept_name END AS WRITER_DEPT_NAME FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL a inner join tbl_attitude b on a.ATTITUDE_ID = b.ATTITUDE_ID inner join tbl_attitude_type c on b.TYPE_ID = c.TYPE_ID and a.COMPANY_ID = c.COMPANY_ID and a.TENANT_ID = c.TENANT_ID where a.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# and a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and a.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId#
and a.APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
and ROWNUM = 1 order by a.APPL_CNT DESC
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL SET APPR_STATUS =
1
2
,APPR_DATE = TO_DATE(#apprDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,APPR_USER_ID = #userId# ,APPR_USER_NAME = #displayName# ,APPR_USER_NAME2 = #displayName2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
AND APPL_CNT = #applCnt#
AND APPL_CNT = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(APPL_CNT) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ATTITUDE_ID = #ids# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)a)
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID, to_char(A.APPR_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS APPR_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.APPR_USER_NAME2 ELSE A.APPR_USER_NAME END AS APPR_USER_NAME, A.APPR_STATUS, A.CONTENT, to_char(C.START_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ORIGIN_DATE, to_char(C.END_DATE + #offset# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHANGE_DATE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TITLE2 ELSE B.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE B.DESCRIPTION END AS DESCRIPTION, C.TYPE_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CANAPPL A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.APPR_USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attModId# inner join tbl_attitude C on A.ATTITUDE_ID = C.ATTITUDE_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID ORDER BY A.APPR_DATE DESC, A.APPL_CNT DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_apr_conn (attitude_id, user_Id, annual_doc_id, annual_appr_status, company_Id, tenant_Id) VALUES(#attitudeId#, #userId#, #docId#, #aprStatus#, #companyId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_attitude_apr_conn SET annual_appr_status = #aprStatus# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND annual_doc_id = #docId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT attitude_Id FROM tbl_attitude_apr_conn WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND annual_doc_id = #docId#

SELECT B.DOCID AS DOCID, B.APRMEMBERSN AS APRMEMBERSN, B.APRTYPE AS APRTYPE, B.APRSTATE AS APRSTATE, B.APRMEMBERID AS APRMEMBERID, B.APRMEMBERISDEPTYN AS APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.APRMEMBERNAME2 ELSE B.APRMEMBERNAME END AS APRMEMBERNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 ELSE B.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE END AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, B.APRMEMBERDEPTID AS APRMEMBERDEPTID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 ELSE B.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME END AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, B.APRMEMBERLDAPPATH AS APRMEMBERLDAPPATH FROM tbl_attitude_apr_conn A INNER JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANYID AND A.ANNUAL_DOC_ID = B.DOCID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId#

SELECT CASE WHEN START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN substr(#startDate#, 1, 11) || substr(to_char(START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) ELSE TO_CHAR(A.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS START_DATE, CASE WHEN END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN substr(#endDate#, 1, 11) || substr(to_char(END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) ELSE TO_CHAR(END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS END_DATE, FROM tbl_attitude WHERE WRITER_ID = #writerId# AND (TYPE_ID = 'A17' OR DATE_TYPE = '4') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( (START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) )

SELECT A.ATTITUDE_ID AS ATTITUDEID, CASE WHEN A.START_DATE + #v_OFFSETMIN# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN substr(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 1, 11) || substr(to_char(A.START_DATE + #v_OFFSETMIN# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) ELSE TO_CHAR(A.START_DATE + #v_OFFSETMIN# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS STARTDATE, CASE WHEN A.END_DATE + #v_OFFSETMIN# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN substr(#v_PENDDATE#, 1, 11) || substr(to_char(A.END_DATE + #v_OFFSETMIN# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) ELSE TO_CHAR(A.END_DATE + #v_OFFSETMIN# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END AS ENDDATE, A.TYPE_ID AS TYPEID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TYPE_NAME2 ELSE B.TYPE_NAME END AS TYPENAME, B.IMG_PATH AS IMGPATH, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS WRITERNAME, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE C.DESCRIPTION END AS WRITERDEPTNAME FROM tbl_attitude A INNER JOIN tbl_attitude_type B ON (A.TYPE_ID = B.TYPE_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID) INNER JOIN tbl_usermaster C ON (C.CN = A.WRITER_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = C.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.MODAPPL <> '5'
AND A.TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A02', 'A03', 'A25') AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND c.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#)
A.DEPT_ID = #v_DEPTID#
A.COMPANY_ID = #v_COMPANYID#
AND ( (START_DATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND START_DATE <= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (END_DATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND END_DATE < TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (START_DATE < TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND END_DATE >= TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) )
AND B.TYPE_NAME like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHTITLE#), '%')
AND A.REGION like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHLOCATION#), '%')
AND ( B.TYPE_NAME like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') OR A.REGION like concat(concat('%', #v_SEARCHALL#), '%') )
AND A.WRITER_ID IN
#v_INDILIST[]#

SELECT TO_CHAR(START_DATE + (#offsetMin#/(60*24)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE WRITER_ID = #writerId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID IN ('A01', 'A02') AND TO_CHAR(START_DATE + (#offsetMin#/(60*24)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') LIKE CONCAT(#startDate2#, '%')
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE SET WORK_STATUS = #workStatus# WHERE ATTITUDE_ID = #attitudeId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T1.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT A.attitude_id AS attitudeid, A.company_id AS companyid, A.tenant_id AS tenantid, A.writer_id AS writerid, A.dept_id AS deptid, A.start_date AS startdate, TO_CHAR(A.start_date, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS starttime, A.modappl, A.type_id AS typeid, B.type_name AS typename, A.work_status AS workstatus FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id JOIN tbl_userlocalinfo D ON A.writer_id = D.USERID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE) AND A.modappl <> 5 ORDER BY TO_DATE(startdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') DESC, writerid, starttime DESC
) T1 )
